PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('mysql_grant')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('mysql_monitor_username')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
          PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)('@')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('mysql_monitor_hostname')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
          PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('/*.*"')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
            PsiWhiteSpace('     ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('present')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('user')
            PsiWhiteSpace('       ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                PsiElement($)('$')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('mysql_monitor_username')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)('@')
              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                PsiElement($)('$')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('mysql_monitor_hostname')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('"')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('table')
            PsiWhiteSpace('      ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''*.*'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('privileges')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
              PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''PROCESS'')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''SUPER'')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('require')
            PsiWhiteSpace('    ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
              PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Mysql_user')
              PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
                PsiElement([)('[')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
                  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                    PsiElement($)('$')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('mysql_monitor_username')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                  PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)('@')
                  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                    PsiElement($)('$')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('mysql_monitor_hostname')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                  PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('"')
                PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiElement(})('}')
